query:
SELECT p.id, p.productCode, p.poNumber, p.batchNo, p.serialNumber, p.imei, p.productName, p.sheetRowNumber, p.stationCode, p.productStatus, p.createdAt, p.updatedAt
FROM products p
WHERE p.serialNumber = 'V42J4RV4FF'
ORDER BY p.id ASC;

SELECT p.id, p.productCode, p.poNumber, p.batchNo, p.serialNumber, p.imei, p.productName, p.sheetRowNumber, p.stationCode, p.productStatus,
  COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY p.serialNumber) AS sameSerialCount,
  COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY p.sheetRowNumber) AS sameRowCount
FROM products p
WHERE p.serialNumber = 'V42J4RV4FF' OR p.sheetRowNumber = 604
ORDER BY p.sheetRowNumber ASC, p.id ASC;

FROM products p
WHERE p.serialNumber = 'V42J4RV4FF'
ORDER BY p.id ASC;

SELECT p.id, p.productCode, p.poNumber, p.batchNo, p.serialNumber, p.imei, p.productName, p.sheetRowNumber, p.stationCode, p.productStatus,
  COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY p.serialNumber) AS sameSerialCount,
  COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY p.sheetRowNumber) AS sameRowCount
FROM products p
WHERE p.serialNumber = 'V42J4RV4FF' OR p.sheetRowNumber = 604
ORDER BY p.sheetRowNumber ASC, p.id ASC;
